messages.content: Determine all functions $f: \mathbb{Z} \rightarrow \mathbb{Z}$ such that, for all $x, y \in \mathbb{Z}$, we have \[ f(2x)+2f(y)=f(f(x+y)).\]
Show that $x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + t^2 \ge xyzt$ for any positive real numbers $x, y, z, t$ that satisfy $2(x + y + z + t) \ge xyzt$.

Find all functions $f\colon \mathbb{R} \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$ such that for all $a,b \in \mathbb{R}$,
 \[ (b - a)f(f(a)) = a f(a + f(b)). \]"
